message:
✨ Fetch real OPA Gatekeeper data instead of demo data

- Query real ConstraintTemplates and Constraints via kubectl
- Display actual violation counts from cluster
- Parse constraint enforcement modes (warn/deny/dryrun)
- Fetch sample violations for policy details modal
- Remove hardcoded demo policies and violations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
